name: Cheddary Chicken Potpie
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of chicken soup; undiluted
1 package (10 oz) frozen vegetables (any type; cooked and drained)
1 cup (4 oz) shredded sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the soup, 1/2 cup of milk, onion, cream cheese, carrots, Parmesan cheese, and salt. Cook and stir until the mixture is hot and the cream cheese has melted.
2. Stir in the chicken and vegetables; heat through. Pour into an ungreased 2-quart baking dish.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the egg, oil, and remaining milk. Add the pancake mix and cheddar cheese; blend well.
4. Spoon over the hot chicken mixture. Sprinkle with almonds.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
YIELD: 6 servings
